title: Trait Overrides Schema
description: Schema for trait_overrides.json containing editorial metadata and phenotype references for traits

trait_type.description: Type of trait: disease_risk or quantitative

unit.description: Unit of measurement for quantitative traits (e.g., kg, mmHg, mg/dL)

norm_mean.description: Mean of genetic score distribution from gnomAD v4.1

norm_sd.description: Standard deviation of genetic score distribution from gnomAD v4.1

norm_coverage.description: Proportion of PGS variants found in gnomAD v4.1

norm_matched_variants.description: Number of PGS variants matched in gnomAD v4.1

phenotype_mean.description: Mean phenotype value in reference population (for quantitative traits)

phenotype_sd.description: Standard deviation of phenotype in reference population (for quantitative traits)

reference_population.description: Reference population for phenotype statistics (e.g., UK Biobank, NHANES)

phenotype_reference_source.description: Citation for phenotype reference (DOI, PMID, or URI)
